import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  match line_opt
  when None
    print("ERR")
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    let parsed = string.parse_int(trimmed)
    match parsed
    when Some(n)
      print("OK=#{n}")
    when None
      print("ERR")
    end
  end
end
